description: Create a content slide on JPMorgan Private Markets Fund April 2026 portfolio composition with a two-column top section of summary tables and a bottom row of four donut charts for composition.

header.headline: JPMorgan Private Markets Fund: April 2026 portfolio composition

steps.label: Portfolio composition
steps.sub: Secondaries 61; Co-investments 44; Primaries 12; Buyout 98%; Growth 2%; Weighted average age 15 months

steps.label: Key portfolio metrics
steps.sub: 57% / 43% LP / GP-led secondaries; 94% no fee, no carry co-investments; $670mm median enterprise value; $45mm median LTM adjusted EBITDA at entry; 12.4x median entry multiple; 4.8x median net debt to EBITDA

steps.label: Composition
steps.sub: Investment Type donut: Secondaries 54%, Co-investments 40%, Primaries 6%; Geography donut: United States 79%, Europe 18%, RoW 3%; Sector donut: Diversified 3%, Communication Services 3%, Consumer Staples 5%, Consumer Discretionary 7%, Financials 7%, Health Care 9%, Industrials 14%, Information Technology 15%
